title.en: Week 29 2026 Refrigeration & Heat Pump Industry Briefing
title.zh: 2026年第29周制冷与热泵行业简报

subtitle.en: Daikin NEXIO Max R32 rooftop HP (NA); AHRI May shipments +6.7%; France Qlima R290 monobloc recall (install height); MHI 10 MW data-centre chiller; China 1 Jul cluster week three; EPA TT final rule ~8 days to 27 Jul
subtitle.zh: Daikin 北美 NEXIO Max R32 屋顶机；AHRI 5月出货 +6.7%；法国 Qlima R290 单体式召回（安装高度）；MHI 10 MW 数据中心冷水机；国内 7/1 集群第三周；EPA 技术转换终稿 7/27 倒计时约8天

en: China 1 Jul ODS cluster in week three: HCFC-141b spray, XPS foam and HCFC solvent bans under continued inspection; FAS 2026/550 next milestone **1 Aug** household solar water heating labels (~13 days); MEE 2027 ODS/HFC quota draft still in comment—filings due **31 Oct 2026**

Daikin Comfort Technologies North America launches NEXIO Max inverter rooftop heat pump on R-32: 7.5–10 ton, IEER 21–22, cold-climate heating to -25°C ambient; matches common curb footprints for retrofit
AHRI May 2026 shipments (reported 14 Jul): central AC + air-source heat pumps 919,685 units, +6.7% YoY; heat pumps +2.3%; YTD combined shipments still -1.2%

France Rappel Conso recall of Qlima WDH R290 all-in-one monoblocs (PVG): install height below 1.8 m risks flammable atmosphere on leak (~290 g charge)—installation compliance counterpoint to week-28 European R290 launch wave
EPA Technology Transitions final rule effective **27 Jul**—~8 days from this briefing; week-27/28 backdrop of inventory installs and DC Circuit challenges continues
zh: 国内 7/1 ODS 监管集群第三周：HCFC-141b 喷涂、XPS 泡沫、HCFC 溶剂禁令持续执法；550 号文下一节点 **8/1** 家用太阳能热水系统标识（约13天）；MEE 2027 配额征求意见稿仍在意见期——**2026年10月31日** 前须提交申请
Daikin Comfort Technologies North America 发布 NEXIO Max 变频屋顶热泵（R-32）：7.5–10 ton，IEER 21–22，可在环境温度低至 -25°C 运行；匹配常见 curb 足迹便于改造
AHRI 2026年5月出货（7/14 披露）：中央空调+空气源热泵合计 91.97 万台，同比 +6.7%；热泵同比 +2.3%；年初至今合计仍同比 -1.2%
法国 Rappel Conso 召回 Qlima WDH 系列 R290 一体式单体机（PVG）：安装高度低于 1.8 m 时泄漏可形成可燃气氛（充注约 290 g）——与第28周欧洲 R290 产品潮形成「发布 vs 安装合规」对照
EPA 技术转换终稿 **7/27** 生效——距本简报约8天；第27–28周库存安装与特区巡回法院诉讼背景延续

title.en: Week 29 2026 Refrigeration & Heat Pump Industry Briefing
title.zh: 2026年第29周制冷与热泵行业简报

Daikin Comfort Technologies North America 发布 NEXIO Max 变频屋顶热泵（R-32）：7.5–10 ton，IEER 21–22，可在环境温度低至 -25°C 运行；匹配常见 curb 足迹便于改造

title.en: Week 28 2026 Refrigeration & Heat Pump Industry Briefing
title.zh: 2026年第28周制冷与热泵行业简报

subtitle.en: LG 7/8 108°C industrial heat pump at Ajin P&P; Haier/Swegon/Daikin R290 launches 7/8–10; Mitsubishi UK high-temp policy white paper 7/10; China 1 Jul cluster week two; EPA TT final rule ~15 days to 27 Jul
subtitle.zh: LG 7/8 108°C 工业热泵首套商用（大邱 Ajin P&P）；Haier/Swegon/Daikin 7/8–10 R290 商用/轻商新品；三菱 7/10 英国高温热泵监管白皮书；国内 7/1 集群第二周；EPA 技术转换终稿 7/27 倒计时约15天

en: China 1 Jul ODS cluster in week two: HCFC-141b spray, XPS foam and HCFC solvent bans under active inspection; FAS 2026/550 projector labels in second week; next milestone 1 Aug household solar water heating labels; MEE 2027 ODS/HFC quota draft still in comment
LG 7/8 industrial HTHP at Ajin P&P: ~1,000 RT system, 108°C outlet (max 118°C), R-1233zd (GWP=1), oil-free magnetic bearing; MOTIE carbon-neutrality R&D consortium since 2023
European R290 product week 7/8–10: Haier commercial monobloc 26–40 kW (cascade to 320 kW, 80°C DHW); Swegon Epsilon Zero 14–45 kW (9 Jul); Daikin Altherma 4 adds 4/6/7 kW (10 Jul)
Mitsubishi Electric UK white paper 7/10: Unlocking High Temperature Heat Pump Adoption—calls for regulatory reform and spark-gap action; Ecodan R290 up to 75°C flow retains existing radiators
EPA Technology Transitions final rule effective 27 Jul—~15 days from this briefing; week-27 HARDI/ACCA/PHCC suits and Supreme Court AIM Act affirmation provide backdrop
zh: 国内 7/1 ODS 监管集群第二周：HCFC-141b 喷涂、XPS 泡沫、HCFC 溶剂禁令执法推进；550 号文投影机标识第二周；下一节点 **8/1** 家用太阳能热水系统标识；MEE 2027 配额征求意见稿仍在意见期
LG 7/8 工业高温热泵商用落地：向大邱 Ajin P&P 纸厂交付约 1000 RT 系统，出水 108°C（最高 118°C），R-1233zd（GWP=1），无油磁悬浮轴承；MOTIE 2023 年起碳中和 R&D 联合体项目
欧洲 R290 产品周 7/8–10：Haier 商用 R290 单体式 26–40 kW（级联至 320 kW，80°C 生活热水）；Swegon Epsilon Zero 14–45 kW（7/9）；Daikin Altherma 4 新增 4/6/7 kW（7/10）
三菱电机 7/10 英国白皮书：Unlocking High Temperature Heat Pump Adoption——呼吁修订高温热泵部署规则并缩小电/气价差；Ecodan R290 最高 75°C 流温可保留既有散热器
EPA 技术转换终稿 **7/27** 生效——距本简报约15天；第27周 HARDI/ACCA/PHCC 诉讼与最高法院维持 AIM 配额法背景延续

title.en: Week 27 2026 Refrigeration & Heat Pump Industry Briefing
title.zh: 2026年第27周制冷与热泵行业简报

subtitle.en: China 1 Jul ODS cluster enters first enforcement week; Supreme Court upholds AIM Act cap-and-trade (22 Jun); HARDI/ACCA/PHCC sue EPA over commercial refrigeration GWP extensions (25 Jun); Systemair Geniox HP DFN R290 AHU (1 Jul); LG Therma V R290 monobloc in Europe
subtitle.zh: 国内 7/1 ODS 监管集群进入首周施行；最高法院 6/22 维持 AIM 法案配额交易；HARDI/ACCA/PHCC 6/25 起诉 EPA 商用制冷 GWP 延期；Systemair 7/1 发布 Geniox HP DFN R290 空调箱；LG Therma V R290 单体式登陆欧洲

en: China 1 Jul cluster in first enforcement week: HCFC-141b on-site spray ban (cold-room/logistics insulation, incl. T/CECS 498); XPS foam HCFC ban; HCFC solvent/cleaning ban; FAS 2026/550 projector energy labels
Supreme Court denies cert (22 Jun): RMS of Georgia v. EPA upholds DC Circuit—AIM Act HFC cap-and-trade allocation remains constitutional

EPA Technology Transitions suits (25–26 Jun): HARDI, ACCA, PHCC challenge commercial refrigeration GWP rise to 1,400 (2027–2032); AHRI and Alliance file separately; residential R-410A install deadline removal welcomed

Systemair Geniox HP DFN (1 Jul): packaged R290 heat-pump AHU, heating COP up to 16, 90% heat recovery, TEWI −30% vs R410A; LG Therma V R290 monobloc (7–14 kW, −28°C/75°C) strengthens European residential line-up

ATMOsphere Network South Korea (25 Jun): 130+ attendees on CO₂ commercial refrigeration; Emart transcritical CO₂ case cuts electricity 38.4% vs R404A neighbour; MEE 2027 ODS/HFC quota draft still in comment
zh: 国内 7/1 监管集群首周施行：HCFC-141b 现场喷涂聚氨酯禁产（冷库/物流保温，含 T/CECS 498 适用范围）；挤出聚苯乙烯（XPS）泡沫 HCFC 发泡剂禁产；电子/仪器/机械 HCFC 溶剂清洗禁限；550 号文投影机能效标识同日实施
最高法院 6/22 拒绝 cert：RMS of Georgia v. EPA 维持 DC 巡回法院判决，AIM 法案 HFC 配额 cap-and-trade 合宪性获确认
EPA 技术转换诉讼 6/25–26：HARDI、ACCA、PHCC 联合起诉 TT 终稿商用制冷 GWP 放宽至 1400（2027–2032）；AHRI 与 Alliance 另案起诉；住宅 R-410A 安装期限取消获行业欢迎
Systemair Geniox HP DFN（7/1）：集成 R290 热泵的 packaged AHU，制热 COP 最高 16、热回收效率 90%，TEWI 较 R410A 版降 30%；LG Therma V R290 单体式（7–14 kW，−28°C/75°C）强化欧洲住宅布局
ATMOsphere Network South Korea（6/25）：130+ 业者聚焦 CO₂ 商用制冷；Emart 首套 transcritical CO₂ 案例较 R404A 邻店电费降 38.4%；MEE 2027 配额征求意见稿仍在意见期

title.en: Week 26 2026 Refrigeration & Heat Pump Industry Briefing
title.zh: 2026年第26周制冷与热泵行业简报

subtitle.en: Intersolar Europe closes with hybrid PV–storage–heat focus (23–25 Jun); EcoFlow Munich launch: OASIS 3.0 & PowerHeat R290 (22 Jun); World Refrigeration Day Cool Intelligence (26 Jun); China 1 Jul regulatory cluster three-day countdown; MEE 2027 ODS/HFC quota draft still in comment
subtitle.zh: Intersolar Europe 6/23–25 闭幕聚焦光储热一体化；EcoFlow 6/22 慕尼黑发布 OASIS 3.0 与 PowerHeat R290；世界制冷日 6/26「Cool Intelligence」；国内 7/1 监管节点集群倒计时约三天；MEE 2027 ODS/HFC 配额征求意见稿仍在意见征集期

en: Intersolar Europe / The smarter E Europe closes (23–25 Jun): ~2,800 exhibitors; GoodWe B4-210, EcoFlow B1-170, Differ Power C2-655, Sigenergy SigenFlux, SKYWORTH R290
EcoFlow European launch (22 Jun): OASIS 3.0 EMS, EcoBot AI, OCEAN 2 storage, PowerHeat R290 heat pump (9/20 kW, ErP A+++, GWP<20)
World Refrigeration Day 2026 (26 Jun): Cool Intelligence theme—ASHRAE and WRD Secretariat highlight AI, digitalisation and field engineering expertise
China 1 Jul cluster (~3 days): HCFC-141b on-site spray ban; XPS foam HCFC ban; HCFC solvents; FAS 2026/550 projector energy labels
MEE 2027 ODS/HFC quota draft (week 24) in public comment—firms should prepare 2027 quota filings due 31 Oct 2026
zh: Intersolar Europe / The smarter E Europe（6/23–25）闭幕：约2800家展商；GoodWe B4-210、EcoFlow B1-170、Differ Power C2-655、Sigenergy SigenFlux、SKYWORTH R290
EcoFlow 6/22 慕尼黑欧洲发布会：OASIS 3.0 能源管理、EcoBot AI、OCEAN 2 户储、PowerHeat R290 热泵（9/20 kW，ErP A+++，GWP<20）
2026世界制冷日（6/26）：主题 Cool Intelligence——ASHRAE 与 WRD 秘书处强调 AI、数字化与现场工程智慧
国内 7/1 监管节点集群（约三天）：HCFC-141b 现场喷涂禁令；挤出聚苯乙烯泡沫 HCFC 禁限；HCFC 溶剂/清洗；550号文投影机能效标识
MEE 2027 ODS/HFC 配额征求意见稿（第24周发布）仍在公众意见期——企业宜筹备2026年10月31日前须提交的2027年度配额申请

title.en: Week 25 2026 Refrigeration & Heat Pump Industry Briefing
title.zh: 2026年第25周制冷与热泵行业简报

subtitle.en: AIM Act CEO sentencing in R-410A import case (17 Jun); HCFC-141b spray ban ten-day countdown (1 Jul); Intersolar Europe opens 23 Jun with GoodWe & Differ Power; EPA Technology Transitions reconsideration commentary (mid-Jun); ASHRAE announces WRD 2026 Cool Intelligence theme (18 Jun)
subtitle.zh: AIM 法案首例企业 CEO 非法进口 R-410A 案 6/17 量刑；HCFC-141b 现场喷涂禁令距 7/1 倒计时约十天；Intersolar Europe 6/23 开幕 GoodWe 与 Differ Power 参展；EPA 技术转换终稿 6 月中旬行业解读；ASHRAE 6/18 宣布 WRD 2026「Cool Intelligence」主题

en: Extreme Residential CEO sentencing (17 Jun): first AIM Act corporate-executive prosecution over 500-cylinder R-410A import
HCFC-141b on-site polyurethane spray ban effective 1 Jul—cold-room and logistics insulation contractors in final compliance push
Intersolar Europe / The smarter E Europe (23–25 Jun): GoodWe B4-210 connected energy; Differ Power C2-655 D1 Series; Power-to-Heat forum 23 Jun
EPA Technology Transitions reconsideration (May final rule): extended supermarket/cold-storage deadlines; pre-2025 AC inventory install flexibility
ASHRAE (18 Jun): World Refrigeration Day 2026 theme Cool Intelligence—26 Jun global campaign
zh: Extreme Residential 前 CEO 6/17 量刑：AIM 法案首例企业高管非法进口 500 瓶 R-410A 刑事案
HCFC-141b 现场聚氨酯喷涂禁令 7/1 生效——冷库与物流保温施工进入末段合规冲刺
Intersolar Europe / The smarter E Europe（6/23–25）：GoodWe B4-210 互联能源、Differ Power C2-655 D1 系列；6/23 Power-to-Heat 论坛
EPA 技术转换 reconsideration 终稿（5 月）：商超/冷库合规期限放宽、2025 年前库存空调安装灵活性
ASHRAE 6/18 宣布 2026 世界制冷日主题「Cool Intelligence」——6/26 全球活动预热

title.en: Week 24 2026 Refrigeration & Heat Pump Industry Briefing
title.zh: 2026年第24周制冷与热泵行业简报

subtitle.en: IRN 2026 closes with ammonia vs CO₂ TCO debate (10–11 Jun); MEE 2027 ODS/HFC quota draft zero growth (10 Jun); IEA: heat pumps competitive in 16 EU countries (12 Jun); GoodWe PV-driven heat pumps at SNEC (11 Jun); Differ Power 9-in-1 R290 hub preview (12 Jun)
subtitle.zh: IRN 2026 闭幕聚焦氨 vs CO₂ 全生命周期（6/10–11）；生态环境部 6/10 发布 2027 配额征求意见稿总量零增长；IEA 6/12：16 国住宅热泵持有成本优于燃气锅炉；GoodWe 6/11 SNEC 发布光伏直驱热泵；Differ Power 6/12 预览 9 合 1 R290 能源枢纽

en: IRN 2026 (10–11 Jun): IIAR keynotes; Star Refrigeration ammonia vs CO₂ lifecycle cost session
MEE draft 2027 ODS/HFC quota plan (10 Jun): zero growth; HFC-245fa cross-category cap raised to 50%
IEA analysis (12 Jun): residential heat pumps cost-competitive vs gas boilers in 16 EU countries
GoodWe GoodHeat (11 Jun): DC-coupled air-to-water heat pumps 6–34.15 kW at SNEC Shanghai
Differ Power D1 Series preview (12 Jun): 9-in-1 R290 solar-storage heat pump ahead of Intersolar Europe
zh: IRN 2026（6/10–11）：IIAR 主旨演讲；Star Refrigeration 氨 vs CO₂ 全生命周期成本专题
生态环境部 6/10 发布 2027 年度 ODS/HFC 配额征求意见稿：总量零增长；HFC-245fa 跨品类调增上限提至 50%
IEA 6/12 分析：16 个欧盟国家住宅热泵全生命周期持有成本优于燃气锅炉
GoodWe GoodHeat 6/11 于 SNEC 上海发布 6–34.15 kW 光伏直驱空气源热泵
Differ Power 6/12 预览 D1 系列 9 合 1 R290 光储热泵，面向 Intersolar Europe 展前发布

title.en: Week 23 2026 Refrigeration & Heat Pump Industry Briefing
title.zh: 2026年第23周制冷与热泵行业简报

subtitle.en: China FAS 2026/550 label rules enter first enforcement week (1 Jun); US DOE ends HEEHR/HOMES fuel-switching rebates (29 May); Danfoss €10M Reyrieux expansion at Choose France (1 Jun); HFC quota tight balance (4 Jun); AHRI CEO Yurek to retire 2027 (4 Jun)
subtitle.zh: 国内 550 号文能效标识 6/1 首周施行；美国 DOE 5/29 叫停联邦返利燃气改电；Danfoss 6/1 于 Choose France 再投 1000 万欧元扩 Reyrieux 热泵部件产能；三代制冷剂配额紧平衡（6/4 机构观点）；AHRI 总裁 Yurek 6/4 宣布 2027 年退休

en: FAS 2026/550: refrigerator & road/tunnel LED label rules effective 1 Jun 2026—first compliance week
US DOE Program Notice 26-2 (29 May): ~$8.8B HOMES/HEEHR rebates no longer cover gas-to-electric fuel switching
Danfoss €10M Reyrieux investment (1 Jun): heat-pump compressors, ATEX lab, on-site solar
Securities research (4 Jun): 2026 HFC quotas unchanged; R32/R134a/R125 tight balance persists
AHRI president & CEO Stephen Yurek to retire in 2027; board search under way (4 Jun)
zh: 发改环资规〔2026〕550 号：家用冰箱与道路隧道 LED 能效标识 6/1 起施行，首周合规窗口开启
美国 DOE 5/29 发布 Program Notice 26-2：约 88 亿美元 HOMES/HEEHR 返利不再支持燃气改电
Danfoss 6/1 于 Choose France 峰会宣布向法国 Reyrieux 热泵部件基地追加 1000 万欧元
证券时报等 6/4：2026 年 HFC 配额总量与 2025 持平，R32/R134a/R125 紧平衡景气延续
AHRI 6/4：总裁兼 CEO Stephen Yurek 将于 2027 年退休，董事会已启动继任搜寻

title.en: Week 22 2026 Refrigeration & Heat Pump Industry Briefing
title.zh: 2026年第22周制冷与热泵行业简报

subtitle.en: 15th IEA HPC Vienna closes with 800+ delegates; EHPA re-elects Crombez & Rittinger Award; China FAS 2026/550 in force 1 Jun; US EPA relaxes AIM Act HFC transitions (26 May); Singapore NEA GWP≤150 from Jul 2027
subtitle.zh: 第15届 IEA 热泵大会维也纳闭幕（800+ 代表）；EHPA 连任 Crombez 并颁发 Rittinger 奖；国内 550 号文冰箱与道路 LED 标识 6/1 施行；美国 EPA 5/26 放宽 AIM 技术转换限值；新加坡 NEA 2027 年起商超 GWP≤150

en: 15th IEA HPC Vienna 26–29 May: 800+ attendees, 367 scientific contributions
EHPA GA 27 May: Patrick Crombez re-elected president; five Rittinger Award recipients
FAS 2026/550: household refrigerator & road/tunnel LED label rules effective 1 Jun 2026
US EPA AIM Act TTR revision (26 May): relaxed supermarket/IPR GWP limits; legacy AC/HP install allowed
Singapore NEA (28 May): supermarket GWP ≤150 from Jul 2027; end-of-life refrigerant handling rules
zh: 第15届 IEA 热泵大会 5/26–29 维也纳：800+ 代表、367 篇科学投稿
EHPA 5/27 大会：Patrick Crombez 连任主席；五人获 Peter Ritter von Rittinger 奖
发改环资规〔2026〕550 号：家用冰箱与道路隧道 LED 能效标识 6/1 起施行
美国 EPA 5/26 修订 AIM 技术转换规则：商超/IPR 限值放宽、住宅热泵遗留库存可继续安装
新加坡 NEA 5/28：2027/7 起商超制冷 GWP≤150；报废制冷设备制冷剂处置须登记

title.en: Week 21 2026 Refrigeration & Heat Pump Industry Briefing
title.zh: 2026年第21周制冷与热泵行业简报

subtitle.en: EU IF25 Heat Auction ~€400M awards; EHPA Q1 2026 Europe heat-pump rebound; China energy-label catalog 2026 from 1 Jun; Vienna IEA HPC opens 26 May; site standards quick reference updated 22 May
subtitle.zh: 欧盟 IF25 工业用热拍卖公布约 4 亿欧元中标、EHPA 通报欧洲 Q1 热泵销量回暖；国内能效标识 2026 版目录 6 月起实施；维也纳 IEA 热泵大会即将开幕；本站工业热泵标准速查 5/22 更新

en: EU IF25 Heat Auction: 22 May — 65 projects, ~€396M, 10 Member States
Commission confirms second industrial heat auction later in 2026 (19 May)
EHPA: ~575k residential units in 11 EU countries in Q1 2026, ~+17% YoY
NDRC/FAS 2026/550: revised energy-label catalog; key rules from 1 Jun 2026
15th IEA Heat Pump Conference, Vienna, 26–29 May (~380 submissions)
zh: 欧盟 IF25 工业用热拍卖：5/22 公布 65 个项目、约 3.96 亿欧元、10 国中标
欧委会 5/19 确认年内将举办第二轮工业用热拍卖
EHPA：欧洲 11 国 2026 Q1 热泵销量约 57.5 万台、同比约 +17%
发改环资规〔2026〕550 号：能效标识目录（2026 版）多项 6/1 起施行
第 15 届 IEA 热泵大会 5/26–29 维也纳开幕（约 380 篇投稿）

title.en: Beyond the Hype: The Real Moat is Extreme Testing (-40°C to +300°C)
title.zh: 超越炒作：真正的护城河是极端测试 (-40°C 至 +300°C)

excerptPlain.en: Claim: Everyone claims 160°C capability, but few can prove it. Reality: The future belongs to those who build CNAS-level infrastructure to verify R744/Steam systems under extreme load boundaries. Prin
excerptPlain.zh: 行业宣称： 行业都在宣称 160°C 能力，但鲜有能证明者。 现实情况： 未来属于那些构建 CNAS 级基础设施以验证 R744/蒸汽系统在极端负载边界下的性能的团队。 核心原则： 验证 > 规格。

title.en: Large Screw Compressor Seizure: Not "Oil Starvation", but "Deadly Stacking of Tolerance & Thermal Deformation"
title.zh: 大型螺杆机抱死真相：不是"缺油"，是"公差与热变形的死亡叠加"

excerptPlain.en: Misconception: Normal oil level (60%+) ≠ effective lubrication. Simply replacing bearings cannot solve "critical friction". Truth: Deep disassembly revealed that a certain series of heavy-duty models
excerptPlain.zh: 误区： 油位正常 (60%+) ≠ 有效润滑。单纯换轴承无法解决"临界摩擦"。 真相： 深度拆解发现， 某系列重载机型 在最大公差组合下，阳转子咬合阴转子约 35μm 。叠加吸气端供油不对称与热变形，导致密封线在无油膜状态下崩塌。 结论： 真正的修复必须从"制造侧重构公差链"与"运行侧增加临界保护"双向入手。

title.en: 5 Site Visits to Solve a "Mystery" Seizure: The -45°C Liquid Trap
title.zh: 5次现场排查：终结 -45°C 液击"悬案"

excerptPlain.en: Initial Diagnosis: Multiple large compressors seized and were initially blamed on manufacturing defects. Root Cause: After 5 site inspections, I traced the root cause not to the machine, but to the sy
excerptPlain.zh: 初步诊断： 多台大型压缩机抱死，最初被归咎于制造缺陷。 根因分析： 经过 5 次现场检查，根因并非机器本身，而是系统：由有缺陷的 -45°C 蒸发器设计导致的偶发性液击。 解决方案： 修复系统后，压缩机得以保全。
